commit.message:
Update README with accurate project description

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make api/ fully self-contained: inline types instead of cross-boundary import

api/_lib/types.ts previously re-exported from ../../src/lib/types.js,
which breaks on Vercel because serverless functions can't resolve
modules outside the api/ directory tree at runtime (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND).

Replaced the re-export with the actual type definitions so api/ has
zero imports reaching into src/. This eliminates the last cross-boundary
dependency that caused auth and other API routes to 500 in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Improve slide variety with design thinking and content-driven guidance (#33)

* Add design thinking guidance to improve slide variety

Encourage agents to reason about design before coding slides:
- Add "Design Thinking" step to SKILL.md creation workflow
- Add "Before Writing Slides" checkpoint to Authoring section
- Add "Before You Start" section to template AGENTS.md
- Reframe design guide principles as content-driven thinking
- Add design philosophy line to each style preset
- Ban box-shadow (broken in PDF export), rename Gradient Night
  to Deep Night, remove shadow references from presets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Warn agents not to overwrite user's primary color without asking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Sync project AGENTS.md with template updates

Add "Before You Start" section and ban box-shadow for PDF compat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Reframe style presets as inspiration, not a spec

Link to Design Thinking step and design guide to reinforce that
presets inform creative decisions rather than replace them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Require agents to present design plan to user before coding

Agents were doing design thinking internally and then building
without user confirmation. Now both the new-deck workflow and
the authoring section explicitly say: share your plan, let the
user approve, then code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use STOP language to force agents to pause for user approval

Agents were treating "present your plan" as internal reasoning
and proceeding to code. Changed to explicit "STOP — do not write
code" + "wait for approval" language in both checkpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Revert STOP language in SKILL.md back to softer design plan guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: create /app/data symlink at build time for read_only filesystem

The entrypoint.sh symlink creation fails when read_only: true is
enabled in docker-compose.yml. Move the symlink to Dockerfile RUN
so it exists at build time. Entrypoint gracefully handles the
already-existing symlink.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix generate-all timeout: skip already-generated workflows

Root cause: generate-all processed all 4 workflows sequentially (~48s each),
totaling 192s — past the 180s client-side AbortController timeout. The server
completed successfully but the browser killed the request, showing a failure.

- Skip workflows with aiGenerated=true in generate-all endpoint (0.4s vs 192s)
- Scale client timeout dynamically: 60s per ungenerated workflow, min 180s
- Only mark ungenerated workflows as "generating" in the UI spinner state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(relatorio-ibscbs): reclassify devoluções by goods flow direction

now appear under the "Entradas" filter instead of "Saídas". Conversely,
devoluções de compra (in_refund) are goods LEAVING, so they move to "Saídas".

commit.message:
fix(security): remove hardcoded API keys; null fake confidence scores

Critical security and trust fixes identified in codebase audit:

1. Hardcoded API keys removed (stock_service.py, options_service.py):
   - 4× Alpha Vantage key hardcoded in stock_service.py → os.getenv('ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY', '')
   - 1× Finnhub key hardcoded in options_service.py → os.getenv('FINNHUB_API_KEY', '')
   - Keys must now be set via environment variables (already in .env, gitignored)
   - Empty string fallback means API calls fail loudly rather than silently using a leaked key

2. Hash-based fake confidence score removed (main_server.py line 6850):
   - Was: 0.75 + (hash(symbol) % 20) / 100  ← deterministic fake, looks real to users
   - Now: None  ← explicit null; frontend must handle absence of confidence gracefully
   - This appeared in the fallback strategy path when OpenAI API key is unavailable

3. Fallback stock scoring clarified (ai_service.py):
   - ml_confidence: 0.5 → None (0.5 falsely implied "50% certain", actually meant "unknown")
   - ml_reasoning: now explicitly states FSS score only, AI unavailable
   - Added fallback_used: True flag so frontend can show appropriate unavailable state

Co-Authored-By: Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: white screen caused by empty Firebase env vars in daily workflow

Root cause: The daily-substack-update workflow referenced non-existent
secrets (VITE_FIREBASE_*) which resolved to empty strings in GitHub
Actions, overriding the .env.production file values. This caused
Firebase to throw "Missing App configuration value: projectId" which
crashed React before rendering.

Also reverts Vite from v7 to v6 as the major version bump was
unnecessary and introduced risk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add ATLAS — Adaptive Trading & Learning Architecture System

Self-upgrading cognitive knowledge engine with 6 learning modules:

- atlas/core.py: Central SQLite knowledge hub capturing 25-dimension
  context snapshot on every trade entry (technical + options + news +
  volume + regime + fundamental). Auto-builds pattern correlations.

- atlas/options_flow_memory.py: Historical PCR zone to outcome mapping.
  Tracks PCR trends, IV percentile zones, unusual OI spikes, max pain.

- atlas/news_impact_mapper.py: News event type to price impact causality.
  15 event categories (EARNINGS_BEAT/MISS, RBI_RATE_CUT/HIKE, etc.)

- atlas/regime_detector.py: Market regime detection (BULL/BEAR/SIDEWAYS/
  VOLATILE/RECOVERY) + time patterns (session, day, expiry week).

- atlas/volume_classifier.py: 9 volume spike types with win-rate tracking.
  BREAKOUT, ACCUMULATION, CLIMAX_BUY/SELL, DISTRIBUTION, INSIDER_SPIKE.

- atlas/causal_engine.py: Multi-dimensional WHY analysis on every trade.
  Primary cause, secondary causes, failure reason, 1-line lesson.

- atlas/self_upgrader.py: Nightly synthesis engine, rebuilds stats, generates
  GOLD/SILVER trading rules, calls Claude Haiku for narrative insights.

Integration: paper_trader logs full snapshot on entry, updates outcome on
close. 8 new API endpoints. Context refresh every 15min, full upgrade 21:00.

commit.message:
openclaw: watchdog restarts gateway after BB restart to re-register webhook

The BB watchdog now kicks the OpenClaw gateway after restarting BlueBubbles,
ensuring the webhook is re-registered with the fresh BB instance. Without
this, the gateway held a stale webhook and silently missed all messages.

step to spin forever despite clicks being recorded.

commit.message:
Add startup runway dashboard with multi-bank PDF/Excel support

- Next.js 15 App Router, Drizzle ORM + SQLite, Recharts
- Upload Revolut CSV, ABN AMRO PDF, N26 PDF, or Excel (.xlsx/.xls)
- Privacy-first: only anonymous monthly aggregates stored, never raw transactions
- ABN AMRO text parser with date-range protection and strict amount detection
- N26 parser with explicit ± sign extraction and multi-line state machine
- Generic Excel parser with heuristic column detection
- Iron-session auth (owner/viewer roles), bcryptjs password hashing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: startup-financial-dashboard
repository.description: Startup runway dashboard — privacy-first financial analytics from Revolut CSV, ABN AMRO PDF, N26 PDF, or Excel. Next.js 15 + SQLite + Recharts.

commit.message:
Fix footer overlap og omdøb til STW-Webdesign

- Footer: overflowWrap + wordBreak på CTA-tekst, explicit padding
- Navbar, Footer, ChatbotWidget, CookieBanner: STW Design → STW-Webdesign
- layout.tsx metadata og OpenGraph: opdateret siteName og title
- om-os/page.tsx og api/chat/route.ts: opdateret navnehenvisninger

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Gate LMS access by subscription tier + auto-enroll on payment

SSO gate (FrappeSSO):
- tier = 0 (Explorer/unsubscribed) → /pricing (must subscribe first)
- tier > 0 (active subscription)   → Frappe SSO + LMS

Auto-enroll (activate-subscription):
- On payment, creates LMS Enrollment records for every course the
  new tier unlocks (Foundation→tier1, Practitioner→tier1+2, Professional→all)
- Skips courses already enrolled; errors are non-fatal (Promise.allSettled)

Note: Frappe LMS paid_course flag requires Payments App — install that
to enforce within-LMS lesson access for mixed-tier users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: replace synthetic cruet_light.png with real NYT screenshot

The previous fixture was a 370×437 PIL-generated approximation.
This replaces it with the actual 528×533 light-mode screenshot.

The real image reveals DETER row colours are byyby (not bybyb as the
synthetic fixture assumed), so expected.json is updated to match.
All 44 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sleep): corriger erreur tsc -b sur bestComputedTime (never)

En A1, bestComputedTime est toujours null au premier accès — TypeScript
avec tsc -b le détecte et réduit le type à never dans la branche droite
du ||. Assigner directement sans condition en A1, les branches A2/A3
gardent le pattern !bestComputedTime || ... qui fonctionne correctement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add --branch and --from flags to grove new (#64)

* Add --branch and --from flags to grove new

Add -b/--branch flag to override the branch name (defaults to worktree
name) and -f/--from flag to specify a base ref for the new branch
(defaults to HEAD). Includes CreateFromRef method on worktree Manager,
command tests, and updated command spec.

Closes #32

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address review feedback for --branch and --from flags

- Add mutual exclusion: --mirror vs --from and --mirror vs --branch
- Validate --from ref exists before git worktree add (clear error message)
- Deduplicate CreateFromRef with Create (Create delegates to CreateFromRef)
- Add real behavior tests for CreateFromRef (valid ref, invalid ref, empty ref)
- Add command tests verifying mutual exclusion annotations

---------

commit.message:
switch model upload to chunked to handle large ZIPs (>1 GB)

Replaces single-request upload_model() with upload_model_chunked()
which splits the ZIP into 50 MB chunks, matching the new dashboard
chunked upload endpoints. Fixes 413 Request Entity Too Large errors
from the OpenShift ingress.

fix: persist notesData to database — notes were lost on refresh

so the backend silently dropped it on save.

commit.message:
add chunked model upload endpoints for large ZIP files

POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/model/upload/init
POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/model/upload/{upload_id}/chunk/{n}
POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/model/upload/{upload_id}/complete

Chunks stored in data/model_uploads/{upload_id}/ with a meta.json
for tracking. Assembled into the same models/ directory as direct
uploads. Needed because model ZIPs (~1 GB) exceed ingress body limits.

commit.message:
ci: trigger reindex when frontmatter changes (#1097)

* ci: trigger reindex when frontmatter changes

Detect frontmatter diffs in changed markdown files, pass frontmatterChanged to
markdown revalidation once per run, and fail when reindex is requested but not
triggered. Also enable manual workflow_dispatch for SDK indexing.

Made-with: Cursor

* ci: remove unrelated index-sdk-references.yml changes

Drop the workflow_dispatch addition to the SDK indexer workflow — it's
not needed for the docs-only frontmatter reindex feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: trigger indexer directly instead of via docs-site API

The GHA already knows frontmatter changed — trigger the indexer workflow
directly with `gh workflow run` instead of round-tripping through the
docs-site endpoint. Simpler, no extra token scopes needed on docs-site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
chore(deps): update rollup to 4.59.0 (fix CVE)

### Why
Dependabot flagged high severity: Arbitrary File Write via Path
Traversal in rollup >= 4.0.0, < 4.59.0.

### Changes
- **package-lock.json** — rollup 4.57.1 → 4.59.0 (transitive via vite)

### Testing
Build passes, 0 npm audit vulnerabilities.
